content: We can reframe the task-agnostic Self-Refine framework as a structural scaffold for implementing multi-perspective LLM self-reflection mechanisms, where each iterative self-feedback round of Self-Refine pulls a distinct inconsistent solving perspective from the LLM to drive refinement. This creates a fully unsupervised multi-perspective reflection framework that requires no additional training, external data, or reinforcement learning, even for open-ended tasks beyond code generation.
